## Describe the Bug

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Send the query '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened — error messages, screenshots, etc.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python version: [e.g., 3.9.13]
- Node version: [e.g., 22.1.0]
- LLM Provider: [e.g., DeepSeek, OpenAI]
- Browser (if frontend): [e.g., Chrome 120]

## Query Example (if applicable)

```
The query that triggered the issue
```

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem.
